data.name: Netoria Tactics 2
data.detailed_description:
An erotic SRPG where combat and gameplay shape the narrative. You play as an outlaw embarking on a desperate quest. The exiled prince Zaman embarks on a desperate quest joined by his girlfriend, his best friend, and a powerful sorceress. While you may all be on the same journey, your destinations will be anything but similar. You will encounter obstacles and opponents that will push your relationships to their breaking point. How will the tapestry of your fates unfold?

Each party member's perspective features unique content and scenarios. From a banished noble trying to win the love of his childhood friend, an earnest maiden on a journey of self discovery, a charismatic rogue attempting to grow his harem, and a manipulative sorceress intent on controlling all of those around her- who will be successful in their aims?

Netoria Tactics 2 features a new setting, new story, and new characters- knowledge of the original game is NOT REQUIRED to enjoy this new chapter of cuckold conflict.

  • PERSPECTIVE CHOICE: Each party member has their own goals, rivals, and scenarios.

  • STORY MODE: Want to skip the combat? Now you can! Experience the game as a VN.

  • MECHANICS DRIVEN: Choices in combat affect the character's relationships.

  • BUILD CHOICE: The new skill system allows you to tweak and customize your characters.

  • GENDER BENDING: Male to female, female to male, and even intersex transformations.

data.short_description: In this erotic SRPG, how you play the battles determines if the the love of our heroes blossoms or if they're torn apart. Love, loss, and gender-bending await our heroes on their quest.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft® Windows® Vista(sp2) / 7 / 8 / 10 (32bit/64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel® Pentium® 4 2.0 GHz equivalent or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1024 x 768 pixels or higher desktop resolution
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
